name: Rich Boiled Fruit Cake from Mary Killen
recipeInstructions:
1. Place margarine, sugar, fruit, and water into a saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil and simmer for approximately 10 minutes.
3. Leave to cool.
4. Sieve flour, spices, and baking soda and add to contents of the saucepan.
5. Beat eggs into the mixture and pour into a greased and lined 7-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake at 160°C (320°F, gas mark 3) for 75 minutes.
